text: Summarily, our novel Ab-Fc-EL-EV@Que system effectively resolved the paradoxical functions of Prdx1 in SAP, offering a promising modality in SAP treatment. Besides, this study establishes a highly adaptable "plug-and-play" platform for tailored therapies against other complex diseases, providing a valuable reference for designing antibody delivery systems across a broad spectrum of diseases.
heading_context: 3.8 Regulatory mechanism exploration of Ab-Fc-EL-EV@Que against SAP
